summary: Fixed search.go: case '' branch never called db.Search(); added FTS snippet extraction with clean text output.
reason: Generated search command's empty-resourceType case created a 'seen' map and returned nil results. Also added cleanSnippet() to strip JSON field noise from FTS snippet() output so context is human-readable.
validated_outcome: 'fathom-pp-cli search "data pipeline clearpack"' returns ranked meetings with clean highlighted snippets.
